title: Merck to buy Terns in $6.7B bet on a ‘differentiated’ leukemia drug
summary: If consummated, the deal would hand Merck a treatment that could challenge Novartis’ fast-selling Scemblix. But the low purchase premium may leave room for a competing bid, analysts said.
summary_ko: Merck는 Terns를 67억 달러에 인수하여 백혈병 치료제 시장에 진출한다.

title: Gilead, with Ouro deal, wagers $1.7B on bispecifics for autoimmune diseases
summary: Acquiring Ouro Medicines, which launched last year, hands Gilead an antibody designed to bind to BCMA and CD3, a pair of immune cell proteins that are popular targets for drugmakers.
summary_ko: Gilead는 Ouro Medicines를 인수하여 17억 달러를 투자하고 자가면역 질환 치료제 개발에 나선다.

title: Endogenex nets $50M to carry intestinal diabetes procedure to the FDA
summary: The fundraising comes after clinical results showed its system met safety goals and led to metabolic improvements in HbA1c, fasting glucose levels and body weight.
summary_ko: Endogenex는 FDA 승인을 위해 소화기 제대루 치료를 개발하기 위해 5000만 달러를 조달했습니다. 임상 결과는 시스템이 안전성 목표를 달성하고 대사 개선을 보였습니다.

title: RA Capital targets China with latest SPAC deal
summary: The prominent investor aims to merge its latest special purpose acquisition company with a Chinese biotech, according to a securities filing.
summary_ko: RA Capital은 중국의 바이오 테크 회사와 합병을 목표로 하는 SPAC 거래를 발표했다.

title: Apogee strengthens case for longer-lasting eczema drug
summary: Company shares climbed by more than 20% on Phase 2 study results suggesting the therapy could provide sustained relief when administered once every three or six months.
summary_ko: Apogee의 아토피 치료제는 3개월 또는 6개월마다 투여 시 지속적인 완화를 제공할 수 있는 것으로 나타났습니다. 이 결과로 회사 주가는 20% 이상 상승했습니다.

title: STAT+: Pharmalittle: We’re reading about a Merck acquisition, the rise of former Loxo execs at Lilly, and more
summary: Merck intends to buy Terns Pharmaceuticals, the developer of a promising leukemia treatment, for $6.7 billion
summary_ko: Merck가 Terns Pharmaceuticals를 67억 달러에 인수할 계획입니다. Terns Pharmaceuticals는 백혈병 치료제를 개발하고 있습니다.

title: How A Small Rural Hospital Is Using AI to Catch Heart Disease Sooner
summary:
At Wayne General Hospital in rural Mississippi, clinicians are using Eko Health’s AI-powered digital stethoscope to detect heart conditions earlier in patients with limited access to specialists. 
The post How A Small Rural Hospital Is Using AI to Catch Heart Disease Sooner appeared first on MedCity News.
summary_ko: 미시시피 주의 한 소규모 농촌 병원은 Eko Health의 인공지능 기반 디지털 청진기를 사용하여 심장 질환을 조기에 발견하고 있다.

title: STAT+: A 2023 health AI bet that seems to be paying off
summary: In this edition of STAT's AI Prognosis: A chat with Qualified Health co-founder and CEO, Justin Norden, as the company raises $125 million.
summary_ko: 건강 관련 AI 기술에 대한 투자가 성과를 보이고 있습니다. Qualified Health는 1억 2500만 달러를 투자받았습니다.

title: STAT+: Qualified Health raises $125 million, as it helps more health systems build and manage AI tools
summary: Qualified Health, which helps health systems build and manage artificial intelligence tools, has raised $125 million.
summary_ko: 퀄리파이드 헬스가 1억 2500만 달러를 투자받아 의료 시스템에 인공지능 도구를 구축하고 관리하는 사업을 확대할 계획이다.

title: Immutrin raises $87M to advance drug for progressive heart disease
summary: The fresh funding will help the biotech startup advance a candidate to treat a genetic disorder, “ATTR-CM,” that has become a battleground for companies like Pfizer, Alnylam and BridgeBio.
summary_ko: Immutrin은 진행성 심장 질환 치료를 위한 신약 개발을 위해 8,700만 달러의 자금을 확보했다. 이 자금은 유전적 장애인 ATTR-CM 치료를 위한 후보물질 개발을 앞당길 것으로 기대된다.

title: After ph. 2 readout, analysts herald 'best-in-class potential' for Maze kidney candidate as stock plummets
summary: Maze Therapeutics has revealed topline phase 2 data for its lead kidney disease candidate that has analysts heralding its “best-in-class potential.” But many investors were racing for the exits Wednesday.
summary_ko: Maze Therapeutics는 신장 질환 치료제의 임상시험 결과를 발표했다. 이 치료제는 분석가들이 '최고의 클래스'로 평가하며, 잠재적으로 신장 질환 치료의 새로운 표준이 될 수 있다.

title: The FDA Is Fast-Tracking Health AI —Women’s Health Can’t Be Left Behind
summary:
Our biggest healthcare problems aren’t only cost or access, but the breakdown in how diagnoses are made, especially for women. Digital health’s new era of AI and real-time data is the most promising solution I’ve seen to fix this, but for these tools to work for women, they must be built on data that actually includes them.
The post The FDA Is Fast-Tracking Health AI —Women’s Health Can’t Be Left Behind appeared first on MedCity News.
summary_ko: FDA는 건강 인공지능을 빠르게 추진하고 있다. 여성 건강은 인공지능의 발전에 뒤처서는 안 된다.

title: Jury Finds Meta and Google Liable in Landmark Social Media Addiction Trial
summary:
Jury Finds Meta and Google Liable in Landmark Social Media Addiction Trial

            A jury in Los Angeles Superior Court reached a verdict Wednesday in a major "social media addiction" personal-injury trial  -  finding both Meta Platforms Inc. (Instagram) and Google (YouTube) liable for harms suffered by the plaintiff.
Lawyer Mark Lanier, of the plaintiff Kaley G.M., arrives at court in a key test case accusing Meta and Google's YouTube of harming children's mental health through addictive s
summary_ko: 메타와 구글이 소셜 미디어 중독 관련 재판에서 책임이 있다고 판결났습니다. 이는 소셜 미디어 산업에 큰 영향을 미칠 수 있습니다.

title: Iran Rejects US Proposed Ceasefire, Counters With 5 Conditions, Prepared To Escalate In Bab al-Mandab Strait
summary:
Iran Rejects US Proposed Ceasefire, Counters With 5 Conditions, Prepared To Escalate In Bab al-Mandab Strait

            Summary


	Iran Does Not Accept Ceasefire, Issues 5 Conditions, Says US Talks Illogical. The statement says that talks are not viable in current conditions, oil rising.
	
	
	3,000 elite Army Airborne soldiers & Marines still en route after Trump said Monday says Iran has been destroyed "militarily". 
	
	
	Iran is tightening control of Hormuz, demanding detailed ship data and
summary_ko: 이란이 미국의 휴전 제안을 거부하고 5가지 조건을 제시했습니다. 이는 중동 지역의 긴장이 높아질 수 있습니다.

title: China Signals Strong Support For Pakistani Offer To Host US-Iran Peace Talks
summary:
China Signals Strong Support For Pakistani Offer To Host US-Iran Peace Talks

            China has made clear that it condemns the US-Israeli attack on Iran, saying the war should have never started, but is now signaling strong support to Pakistani-mediated efforts at finding peace.

Beijing has commented on the Pakistani offer to host US-Iran talks aimed at ending the war, with Chinese Foreign Ministry spokesman Lin Jian telling reporters in Beijing: "Ceasefire and peace talks are more importa
summary_ko: 중국이 파키스탄의 미국-이란 평화 회담 개최 제의를 강력히 지지하고 있습니다.

title: In Win For Putin, India Buys 60 Million Barrels Of Russian Oil, As Refiners Increasingly Transact In Yuan, Dirham
summary:
In Win For Putin, India Buys 60 Million Barrels Of Russian Oil, As Refiners Increasingly Transact In Yuan, Dirham

            Indian refiners have bought about 60 million barrels of Russian oil for delivery next month, which is set to ease some supply concerns as the Middle East war chokes flows.

Citing people familiar, Bloomberg reports that the cargoes were booked at premiums of $5 to $15 a barrel to Brent. The volume is similar to the amount of purchases for this month, but more than double
summary_ko: 인도가 6,000만 배럴의 러시아 원유를 구매했습니다. 이는 러시아와 인도 간의 경제 협력 강화로 볼 수 있습니다.

title: Sarepta sees early success with RNAi drugs from Arrowhead
summary: Long-awaited results from Phase 1/2 studies lifted Sarepta’s stock and, according to the company, suggest potential for two medicines to treat muscle-weakening conditions.
summary_ko: Sarepta는 Arrowhead의 RNAi 약물에 대한 초기 성공을 보았습니다.

title: FDA approves Denali's Hunter syndrome drug, breaking streak of rare disease rejections
summary: The FDA has approved Denali Therapeutics’ enzyme replacement therapy for a genetic lysosomal storage disease, breaking the agency’s recent string of rejections for rare disease treatments.
summary_ko: FDA는 Denali Therapeutics의 헌터 증후군 치료제를 승인했다. 이는 기관이 최근에 거부한 희귀병 치료제에 대한 승인이다.

title: Imminent SpaceX IPO Filing Ignites Rally Across Space-Linked Stocks
summary:
Imminent SpaceX IPO Filing Ignites Rally Across Space-Linked Stocks 

            News that SpaceX may file an initial public offering prospectus with the Securities and Exchange Commission this week or next sparked a rally across SpaceX-linked names, satellite broadband providers, space transportation firms, and even publicly traded closed-end funds that hold private SpaceX shares.

The Information reports that SpaceX is set to file an IPO prospectus with the SEC this week or next, with plans f
summary_ko: 스페이스X의 即将到来的 상장으로 우주 관련 주가가 상승했다.
korea_search_query: IPO OR 상장 우주항공 OR 우주산업 위성

title: FDA approves Denali's Hunter syndrome drug, handing rare disease community a win
summary: The FDA has approved Denali Therapeutics’ enzyme replacement therapy for a genetic lysosomal storage disease after a string of high-profile rejections for rare disease candidates.
summary_ko: FDA는 Denali Therapeutics의 헌터 증후군 치료 약물을 승인했습니다. 이는 희귀 질환 치료 시장에서 새로운 기회를 창출하는 것으로 보입니다.

title: Artificial Intelligence, Real Misallocation
summary:
Artificial Intelligence, Real Misallocation

            Authored by Peter C. Earle, Ph.D,

Artificial intelligence may well be the most important technological development of the coming decade-and that is exactly why the current capital surge around it warrants skepticism. History is littered with transformative innovations that were nonetheless disastrously overbuilt and mispriced in their early phases. Austrian Business Cycle Theory was never a children’s story in which every boom ends with c
summary_ko: 인공지능은 향후 10년 동안 가장 중요한 기술 개발이 될 수 있다.

title: Why The Fertilizer Crisis May Spark Record Inflows Into Agri ETFs
summary:
Why The Fertilizer Crisis May Spark Record Inflows Into Agri ETFs 

            Goldman Now Anticipates Record Inflows For AGRI ETFs

Second- and third-order effects from a three-week - and potentially longer - disruption at the Strait of Hormuz are extending well beyond energy markets.

Even as some vessel transits resume through the narrow waterway, the shipping backlog continues to build across the Gulf region and could take weeks, if not longer, to clear.

At the same time, Qatar's LNG expor
summary_ko: 금융 위기 속에서 비료 부족으로 인한 농업 ETF에 대한 투자가 급증할 수 있으며, 골드만 삭스는 기록적인 유입을 예상하고 있다.

title: STAT+: FDA approves Denali Therapeutics drug for Hunter syndrome
summary: The FDA approved a new medicine from Denali Therapeutics for Hunter syndrome, a notable decision by the agency after a string of rejections of rare disease drugs.
summary_ko: FDA가 헌터 증후군 치료제를 승인하여, 이는 희귀 질환 치료제 개발에 대한 투자의 기회를 나타낸다.

title: Heart failure is common. A quick MRI could improve diagnosis and guide treatment
summary: A new MRI method measures cardiac oxygen use in three minutes without catheters or radiation, offering a simpler way to study heart failure and metabolism.
summary_ko: 심장 부전을 진단하고 치료하는 새로운 MRI 방법이 개발되어, 이는 심장 질환의 치료와 연구에 큰 영향을 미칠 수 있다.
